commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the embedded-agent extra-params predicate so DeepSeek V4 `microsoft-foundry-*` providers skip the top-level `thinking` wrapper and adds an alias-provider regression test.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +20. Total +27 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main still matches `microsoft-foundry-9433/deepseek-v4-pro` and the wrapper then injects `thinking`. I did not run the live Foundry gateway probe because no credentials are available in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is live provider proof plus maintainer branch selection, not an automated code repair.
